description: Platinum Analytics Cayman Limited operates as a software developer for financial institutions in Singapore. The company operates a spot FX trading platform, including the Electronic Communications Network (ECN), which provides brokerage-based trading solutions. Its products portfolio comprises Pricing Engine that enables real-time price discovery by aggregating liquidity, applying customizable spreads, and generating executable pricing for multiple currency pairs, as well as supports differentiated logic for regional trading venues and is optimized for onshore and offshore FX markets; Order Ma
